notes: The required decision values {mandatory adoption, partial adoption, rejection} are not synthesized because the CP interleave window has already passed and an owner decision is required.
The only honest machine-actionable result is a missed-window blocker with escalation to runtime rebaseline/scope revision.
Full Claude review is waived by user instruction and is not counted as valid review evidence.

blocked_claims: This record does not claim the runtime/mixed interleave decision was made before CP completion.
This record does not rewrite closed CP evidence.
This record does not reinterpret descriptor packs as runtime_ready.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.

next_required_action.decision_needed: Approve treating the missed CP interleave as a post-CP L2/L4 runtime rebaseline, or approve a separate scope revision path.
